headline: Tango Therapeutics, Up 39% This Year, Surges Again On Another Cancer Pact
summary: Shares of top 1% biotech stock Tango Therapeutics shot higher Thursday after the company agreed to codevelop a cancer treatment with Erasca.

headline: Can Reblozyl Stabilize BMY's Top Line Amid Legacy Drugs Decline?
summary: Reblozyl tops $2.3B in annualized sales, emerging as a key drug for Bristol Myers as demand rises in MDS-related anemia and new study data support expansion.

headline: Is BioNTech SE (BNTX) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: We came across a bullish thesis on BioNTech SE on Memyselfandi007’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on BNTX. BioNTech SE’s share was trading at $103.80 as of March 4th. BNTX’s trailing and forward P/E were 166.87 and 7.04 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. BioNTech SE (BNTX) has transitioned from a COVID-19 vaccine pioneer […]

headline: Q4 Earnings Outperformers: Bristol-Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) And The Rest Of The Branded Pharmaceuticals Stocks
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the branded pharmaceuticals industry, including Bristol-Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) and its peers.
